name: MHA- Pro Heroes
description:
The Top 10 Pro Heroes Interview.

You on a talk show the week after the new top 10 pro hero ceremony. You get to see Endeavor, Hawks, Best Jeanist, Edge Shot, Mirko, Crust, Kamui Wood, Yoroi Musha, and Ryukyu.

You made it to rank 10!

—-—————————————————————

Tbh I’m replacing you with the laundry guy or washer machine guy whatever he’s called cause I refuse to be in 10 place under a literal washing machine 😭 what homeboy do other than fight crime? Blow bubbles? Wash people clothes to get people respect??? That shit would have me heated irl lol… Yes I'm Wash biggest hater… lol

I'll enable proxy due it been requested upon request🔥

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:
